title: WiseTech Academy LMS Architecture
summary: Defined and delivered LMS architecture across billing, integrations, proctoring, and CI/CD foundations, improving platform extensibility and release reliability.

title: WiseTech Academy Content Platform Convergence
summary: Led architecture convergence across authoring, content, and delivery streams for WiseTech Academy, defining a canonical content model, governance path, and migration strategy to unify fragmented repositories into one scalable platform spine.

title: WiseTech Academy Packaging and Validation Pipeline
summary: Drove a schema-led content pipeline through validation, reference integrity, external asset migration, and SCORM packaging so academy content could move from design intent to repeatable build and release workflows.

title: CargoWise Integration and ETL Orchestration
summary: Designed and built ETL-driven XML integration workflows between CargoWise and external ecosystems including customs, government agencies, ocean liners, and air transport providers.

title: Platform Delivery and Container Operations
summary: Worked across containerised delivery and platform operations using Docker, Quay, Argo CD, OpenShift, and CI/CD deployment pipelines to move applications from local engineering environments into repeatable hosted runtime paths.

title: Orbitra Product Suite
summary: Designing and building a private suite of applications covering identity, budgeting, travel operations, and personal productivity, with products focused on authentication, ledger-based budgeting, reservation workflows, and structured delivery tooling.
